{{CargoRelic
|name=Fortune Cat Mainspring
|class_id=20335
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Because its owner would break it open once a week, Fortune Cat felt indignant and took refuge with the Demon Gods, who trained it to be a killer. Unfortunately, this cute cat was not good at fighting. Soon after the fight with the snail, it was beaten back to its original form and turned into a Relic!
|fame=12
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=18
|tech=30
|ss1=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +20000
|ss2=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +40000
|ss3=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +60000
|ss4=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +60000
|ss7=In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +60000<br> (Awakened)
}}
